stance.body: Two thousand members. Two houses in Tbilisi. Fifteen certified coaches. Form before weight, weight before ego.
stance.body_stats: Two thousand members. Two houses in Tbilisi. Fifteen certified coaches.
stance.body_principle: Form before weight, weight before ego.

hero.title:
Stronger
every day.
hero.subtitle: A house for serious training. Built around stillness, symmetry, and the work that compounds.

manifesto.headline: A gym is not a mirror and a barbell. It is a practice. A daily conversation between body and person, who decides each morning to come back.

principles.title: Coached, not curated
principles.desc: Form first. Weight after. Ego, never.

principles.title: A room for everyone
principles.desc: Pilates, strength, cardio, recovery. Under one roof.

principles.title: Built for Tbilisi
principles.desc: Two locations. One community. Open until 23:00.

founder.name: Tato Joglidze
founder.quote: I built Mata for the work I wanted to do every day. Form before weight. People before metrics. The room is small enough that I still know your name.

academy.lede: Twelve weeks of mentorship under the head coach. Programming, technique, coaching craft. Two cohorts a year, by application.
academy.stance_body_1: A weekend course makes a certificate. A coach is something else. The Academy is structured around the work that actually changes how you teach: thousands of reps watched, programming written and rewritten, conversations with members who trust you with their week.
academy.stance_body_2: Two cohorts a year. Eight seats each. The bar is real, and the work is the curriculum.
academy.weeks_1_4_desc: Anatomy under load. Movement screens. Coaching language. Shadow the head coach, three sessions a week.
academy.weeks_5_8_desc: You write the cycles. You defend the choices. Two members assigned. Weekly review with faculty.
academy.weeks_9_12_desc: You coach. The mentor watches. Corrections come in private. By week twelve you run a full block alone.
academy.cta_body: Send us a short letter: who you've coached, what you read, why this room. We reply to every application within two weeks.

items.summary: Powerlifting, hypertrophy, Olympic. Every set with a coach watching.
Reformer, mat, mobility. A separate studio under the vaulted hall.
Intervals, rowing, runs. A heart rate that means something.
Functional strength at high intensity, in a class format.
12-week mentorship with the head coach. By application only.
An individual plan from the in-house nutritionist. Training continued in the kitchen.

trainers.body: We pick coaches by how they teach, not by how they look in a mirror.

portal.subtitle: A mobile companion: your training plan, nutrition, bookings, and exclusive video lessons in one place.

captions.plan: Your weekly plan, ready to read
captions.bookings: Book a class in one tap

pricing.subtitle: Two ways in. No multi-year contracts; cancel with seven days' notice.

tiers.name: Drop-in
tiers.desc: First visit free. Single visit ₾25; book at the front desk.

tiers.name: Member
tiers.desc: The full house. Every discipline, both locations, one card.

tiers.name: By Application
tiers.desc: 1:1 with the head coach, twice a week. Selective access.

tiers.name: Mata Academy
tiers.desc: We train coaches. A 12-week program, mentor head coach, then your own room.

locations.body: Both houses open every day, 06:00–23:00. The first visit is free.

items.q: Three months in, I changed weight and mood. Mata is a real team.
The first gym I don't want to leave. Personal attention in everything.
The portal is magic: plan, videos, bookings in one place.
The CrossFit classes are the best in Tbilisi. Energy and community.
The coaches catch every detail. Results show.
How do I start training at Mata?
items.a: Book a free intro visit online or walk into either house. A coach will meet you and help you start.
Yes. Member and Atelier tiers can pause for up to 30 days per year.
Yes. Every new member gets one free full visit, with a coach.

items.q: I have an injury, can I train?
items.a: Our certified coaches build a safe plan in coordination with your physiotherapist.

items.q: How does the Mata portal work?
items.a: An iOS and Android app: your plan, bookings, nutrition, and video lessons for Members.

items.q: Do you have a kids' program?
items.a: Yes. Mata Kids for ages 7–14, weekends at Moscow Ave. 29.

final_cta.body: Your first visit is free. Pick a time, show up. We'll take care of the rest.

not_found.body: The page you're after isn't here. Try the front door; that's where everything starts.

footer.quote: Show up. Move with intention. The rest is repetition.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Mata Fitness · Tbilisi · Made with iron and intention
